name: Mythbreaker Marn
bio: voidking_morr (ON_ALLY_DEATH self-buff + L5 mutation doubling every ally death) anchors a team built to feed it. crypt_wraith epic + four VOID rares (echo_lich, nullhound, riftwraith, mindroot) turn every fall into a wave of payoffs amplified by L5. The most synergistic champion in the field.
